🎾
[NIKTENNIS]
Book · Play · Improve
By continuing you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Terms of Service
Last updated: May 1, 2025
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using the NikTennis app ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and NikTennis.

2. Service Description

NikTennis provides a tennis class booking platform allowing clients to view available classes, make reservations, and manage their bookings. The Service is provided by Nikola Krajic, operating as NikTennis.

3. Booking & Payment

All bookings are subject to availability. Payment must be completed within 2 hours of booking confirmation to secure your spot. Accepted payment methods include Venmo (@Nikola-Krajic), Zelle (914-329-4034), and Bitcoin.

NikTennis reserves the right to release your reserved spot if payment is not received within the specified timeframe.

4. Cancellation Policy

Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the scheduled class time to receive a refund or pack credit. Cancellations made within 24 hours of the class are non-refundable.

No-shows forfeit their session fee or pack lesson. NikTennis reserves the right to cancel or reschedule classes and will provide notice when possible.

5. Class Packs

Class packs are non-transferable and non-refundable once purchased. Packs do not expire unless otherwise specified. NikTennis reserves the right to adjust pack pricing with reasonable notice.

6. User Conduct

You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree not to share your account with others or attempt to access other users' accounts.

7. Liability Disclaimer

Participation in tennis activities involves inherent physical risks. By booking a class, you acknowledge these risks and agree to hold NikTennis and Nikola Krajic harmless from any injury, loss, or damage arising from your participation.

8. Intellectual Property

All content, design, code, and branding of the NikTennis app is proprietary and owned exclusively by NikTennis. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use of any part of this Service is strictly prohibited.

9. Changes to Terms

NikTennis reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

10. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at: nik@niktennis.com

Privacy Policy
Last updated: May 1, 2025
1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly when creating an account or booking a class, including your name, email address, and tennis level.

We also collect booking history, payment method preferences (not payment details), and app usage data to improve the Service.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your information is used to manage your account, process bookings, communicate class schedules and changes, and improve the Service.

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

3. Payment Information

NikTennis does not store any payment information. Payments are made directly through third-party services (Venmo, Zelle, Bitcoin). Please refer to those services' privacy policies for information on how they handle your data.

4. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored securely using Supabase, a trusted database platform with industry-standard encryption. We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.

5. Data Retention

We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. Booking history is retained for business and accounting purposes. You may request deletion of your account by contacting us.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us at nik@niktennis.com.

You may also request a copy of all personal data we hold about you at any time.

7. Cookies & Local Storage

The NikTennis app uses browser local storage to maintain your login session and preferences. No third-party tracking cookies are used.

8. Children's Privacy

The Service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us information, please contact us immediately.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify users of significant changes through the app. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

10. Contact Us

For privacy-related questions or requests, contact us at: nik@niktennis.com
